arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney and Gary Neville lead Man Utd tributes to Denis Law after his death
arts.sum: Tributes have been flooding in after Denis Law, part of Manchester United's 'Holy Trinity', a Ballon d'Or and European Cup winner and Scotlands joint all-time leading goalscorer, died on Friday at the age of 84

arts.ttl: Man Utd hopeful of Gyokeres deal - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United hopeful of singing Viktor Gyokeres, Arsenal interested in Norwegian teenager Sverre Nypan, Chelsea targeting Alejandro Garnacho for a January move, plus more.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer names one transfer Man Utd must make to address Ruben Amorim flaw
arts.sum: Manchester United have shown signs of improvement and are unbeaten in three matches under Ruben Amorim, but Alan Shearer has identified a major problem that still needs addressing

arts.ttl: Kenny Dalglish delivers emotional tribute to 'hero' Denis Law as Man Utd reveal plan to honour an icon
arts.sum: Legendary Law sadly passed away at the age of 84 following a battle with Alzheimer's

arts.ttl: Farewell to a film star footballer dressed in Manchester United red: Denis Law had glory, glamour and goals but with a streak of humility - he embodied what the club should stand for, writes IAN LADYMAN
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN: He still came to Old Trafford whenever he could. With the collars on his raincoat pulled up to his ears. Almost as though he didn't want anybody to know it was him.

arts.ttl: Manchester United legend Denis Law's career in pictures
arts.sum: Denis Law, Manchester United and Scotland legend, has died at the age of 84

arts.ttl: Manchester United announce plan to pay tribute to Denis Law after legend's death
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Denis Law has passed away at the age of 84 and the club will pay tribute to the former forward before Sunday's Premier League clash against Brighton

arts.ttl: Chido Obi-Martin uses Cristiano Ronaldo celebration in stylish Manchester United academy victory
arts.sum: Man Utd's Under-18s progressed to the next round of the FA Youth Cup against Preston North End on Friday night.

arts.ttl: King of the Stretford End – former Man Utd captains lead tributes to Denis Law
arts.sum: Law won two league titles with Manchester United and was a member of their European Cup-winning side under Sir Matt Busby in 1968.

arts.ttl: Manchester United seriously interested in £84m Chelsea attacking target - Sky journalist
arts.sum: Both Manchester United and Chelsea could be looking to bring in new forwards during the January transfer window. Manchester United, who have struggled in front...
